description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a smooth beige finish and a minimalist design. The cabinet features two visible drawers on the front, each with a flat, handle-less face, contributing to its modern aesthetic. The top of the cabinet is open, revealing internal compartments that may be used for organizing files or supplies. The cabinet stands on four black caster wheels, making it easy to move across flat surfaces. The sides and back are plain, with no visible handles or decorative elements, and the construction appears to be primarily wood or laminated particleboard. This type of cabinet is commonly found in office environments for storing documents and supplies.
description: A tall, beige filing cabinet with two drawers, an open top compartment, and four caster wheels for mobility. Its minimalist design and smooth surfaces make it suitable for modern office settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two flat-faced drawers and an open top compartment, with wheels visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, unadorned surface and the depth of the cabinet, with wheels at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless back panel and the cabinet's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain surface and visible wheels.
